preconditions: The run is read-only for source files.
The output directory exists or can be created locally.
steps: Create a fixture directory under tmp/local-file-inbox-summary/inbox.
Add two .txt files with sample notes.
Run the local summarizer in dry-run mode or manually produce the digest from the fixture files.
dry_run: Use fixture files under tmp/ and write only to automations/runs/.
approval_gates: Required before external sends, deletes, moves, syncs, or production scheduling.
observability: Run record includes input count, output path, checks, status, and errors.
Heartbeat or task update notes blockers and result.
error_handling: If the input directory is missing, fail with a clear message and do not create an empty production digest.
If a file cannot be read, include the filename in errors and mark the run failed.
If output cannot be written, preserve source files and mark the run failed.
rollback: Remove the generated digest and run record. No source file changes are made.
tests: Fixture with two files yields two entries.
Missing inbox returns failed run record.
